commands_run.notes: Build emitted existing FJumpRoute.cpp pointer-cast warnings.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: ADF and MR entries continue to apply as cumulative point loss while current values remain above zero.
ADF entries convert to normal weapon hull damage when current ADF is already zero.
MR entries convert to normal weapon hull damage when current MR is already zero.
Repeated hits on already-damaged single-state systems convert to normal weapon hull damage instead of reasserting the same state.
acceptance_criteria.notes: Expanded to include partially damaged nonzero DCR below max.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Weapon-hit and defense-hit fallback behavior remains unchanged for ships that still have an eligible undamaged component.
Damage-resolution output for converted hits records hull damage, not a zero-change non-hull effect.
acceptance_criteria.notes: Partial DCR repeat-hit case asserts a single TDET_HullDamage effect.
